label: 15Five
description: Connect 15Five to sync performance check-ins, OKRs, and employee feedback data.

form.title: Connect 15Five
form.subtitle: Paste your 15Five personal API token to start syncing check-ins, OKRs, and performance data.

methods.label: Personal API Token
methods.description: Paste your personal API token from 15Five Account Settings. No OAuth setup required — just copy and paste.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a 15Five Personal API Token

1. Log in to your 15Five account at [app.15five.com](https://app.15five.com).
2. Click your avatar or initials in the top-right corner and select **Account Settings**.
3. In the left sidebar, navigate to **Integrations → API**.
4. Click **Generate Token** (or copy an existing token if one is already shown).
5. Copy the token — it may only be shown once. If you lose it, you can regenerate a new one from the same page.
6. Paste the token into the **API Token** field below.

## Notes

- The token is scoped to your personal 15Five account. Admin-level accounts will have access to company-wide data.
- If you regenerate the token, the old one is immediately invalidated — update Anton with the new token.
- Refer to the [15Five API documentation](https://developer.15five.com/) for details on available endpoints and rate limits.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.placeholder: Paste your 15Five personal API token here
fields.description: Found in Account Settings → Integrations → API. Keep this secret — it grants access to your 15Five data.

fields.name: subdomain
fields.label: Company Subdomain
fields.description: Optional. Your 15Five subdomain (the part before .15five.com). Leave blank if unsure.
